<fieldset>
  <legend>Contact preferences</legend>
  <table>
    <tr>
      <td><input type="checkbox" id="em" name="prefs" value="email"> <label for="em">Email</label></td>
      <td><input type="checkbox" id="sm" name="prefs" value="sms"> <label for="sm">SMS</label></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><input type="checkbox" id="ph" name="prefs" value="phone"> <label for="ph">Phone</label></td>
      <td><input type="checkbox" id="pn" name="prefs" value="push"> <label for="pn">Push</label></td>
    </tr>
  </table>
</fieldset>
